'''鈭歾h-b-f-w''' ('''kazhabfewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vanishify|vanishify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-f-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vanishify|vanishify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-b-f-w
|-
! Lemma
| kazhabfewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhabfewoko|thizhabfewoko]] || [[word:jizhabfewoko|jizhabfewoko]] || [[word:shizhabfewoko|shizhabfewoko]] || [[word:kizhabfewoko|kizhabfewoko]]
